etymology.description: Depicts a spindle -> original form of 專(專) (zhuān, "specialized") and 惠(惠) (huì, "favor")
etymology.interpretation: The character 叀 represents the image of a spindle, used for winding thread, symbolizing fullness or accumulation, which connects to the ideas of 'stuff' or 'fill.' It served as a precursor to characters like 專(專) (zhuān, "specialized") and 惠(惠) (huì, "favor"), reflecting its foundational meaning in those contexts.
